details: The agent executed real tool calls (list_commits, list_pull_requests, pull_request_read with get_check_runs) and found 5 distinct failed workflow runs with actual run IDs confirmed by tool output. Failed job names were correctly extracted from real API data for each run. The agent acknowledged it couldn't confirm exact workflow names (only inferred 'CI (PR checks)'), but this was an honest limitation of the available MCP tools lacking a direct list_workflow_runs endpoint. The agent did not hallucinate any data. All 5 runs reported (23386492260, 23386483382, 23386479610, 23386455119, 23385977797) had failures confirmed by actual check run API responses, and specific failed job names were provided for each.
